name: Crush Comp
explanation: An aggressive FET-style compressor with built-in distortion. A fast, stereo-linked peak detector drives a soft-knee, dB-domain gain computer whose ratio steps from a gentle 2:1 up to a slamming NUKE all-in extreme; attack and a program-dependent release shape the punch. A DIST stage layers asymmetric 2nd/3rd-harmonic FET grit that grows as the compressor works, then a dry/wet Mix blends it back. Controls: Threshold, Ratio (gentle to NUKE), Attack, Release, Dist and Mix.
